title: $HIDE_ALL_PREVIOUS_FORMS
text: $HIDE_ALL_PREVIOUS_FORMS Hide all previous forms when the current form is being displayed. $HIDE_ALL_PREVIOUS_FORMS = 1 | 0 Defaults Assignment file: Any application assignment file Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: 0 Description This setting overrides the Hide Previous Forms window property for the current form. Related Links Hide Previous Form property that determines whether open forms are removed from the display when this form is run. True or False (Default). Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
